13993483.title: Dave Hayer
13993483.extract: Dave Sukhdip Singh Hayer (born 1958) is a former Indo-Canadian politician for the province of British Columbia. He served as member of the Legislative Assembly (MLA) for Surrey-Tynehead from 2001 to 2013. Hayer is the son of assassinated journalist Tara Singh Hayer.
